title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the practice of building and orchestrating the wrapper layers around LLM-based coding agents. It consists of two levels: first, an AI layer managing rules, skills, hooks, and subagents for a single session; second, orchestrating multiple agent sessions into workflows with focused jobs. The harness comprises roughly 98% of a production agent's value.
